message:
feat: expand optimizer, nn, and kernel subsystems with conformance coverage

Major expansion across the workspace bringing test count from 804 to 1009:

ft-optim: Implement SGD (with momentum, dampening, nesterov, weight_decay),
Adam (with amsgrad), AdamW, and learning rate scheduler support. Adds
optimizer_cases.json conformance fixtures validating parameter update
correctness against reference PyTorch outputs.

ft-nn: Add Linear layer forward/backward, ReLU/Sigmoid/Tanh activations,
Dropout with deterministic mask seeding, BatchNorm1d with running stats,
MSELoss/CrossEntropyLoss, and Sequential container.

ft-kernel-cpu: Expand CPU kernels with matmul, transpose, clamp, pow,
log, exp, softmax, log_softmax, argmax/argmin, and topk operations.

ft-dispatch: Wire all new kernel ops through the dispatch layer with
proper metadata and device routing.

ft-api: Expose optimizer step/zero_grad, nn module forward, and new
tensor operations (matmul, softmax, clamp, etc.) at the public API level.

ft-core/ft-device/ft-runtime/ft-serialize/ft-autograd: Supporting
infrastructure updates for new op variants, device capability queries,
runtime tensor allocation, serialization of optimizer state, and
backward pass support for new operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -74,7 +74,7 @@ index_select, gather, scatter, masked_fill
 - `crates/ft-conformance/fixtures/serialization_cases.json`
 
 Modes tested for all listed families: strict + hardened.
-804 tests passing across workspace.
+1009 tests passing across workspace.
 
 ## Gap Policy

@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ This folder stores normalized oracle-vs-target fixtures for `ft-conformance`.
 - `autograd_scheduler_cases.json`: deterministic scheduler ordering + reentrant policy contract.
 - `serialization_cases.json`: checkpoint encode/decode + RaptorQ sidecar/proof contract.
 - `nn_state_cases.json`: NN module/state contract first-wave fixture family (registration, state export, mode propagation, load strictness split, prefix normalization, hooks) for packet `FT-P2C-008`.
+- `optimizer_cases.json`: SGD/Adam optimizer update parity fixtures (including momentum/nesterov/weight-decay branches) for packet `FT-P2C-009`.
 
 Related adversarial/fuzz manifest (versioned):
 - `artifacts/phase2c/ADVERSARIAL_FUZZ_CORPUS_MANIFEST_V1.json`
